en: The wisest of women builds her house, but folly with her own hands tears it down.
zh: 智慧婦人建立家室， 愚妄婦人親手拆毀。

en: Whoever walks in uprightness fears the LORD, but he who is devious in his ways despises him.
zh: 行事正直的，敬畏耶和華； 行為乖僻的，卻藐視他。

en: By the mouth of a fool comes a rod for his back, but the lips of the wise will preserve them.
zh: 愚妄人的口中長出驕傲的枝子； 智慧人的嘴唇，能保障自己。

en: Where there are no oxen, the manger is clean, but abundant crops come by the strength of the ox.
zh: 沒有耕牛，槽頭乾淨； 出產豐盛，卻是憑著牛的力量。

en: A faithful witness does not lie, but a false witness breathes out lies.
zh: 誠實的證人不說謊話； 虛偽的證人吐出謊言。

en: A scoffer seeks wisdom in vain, but knowledge is easy for a man of understanding.
zh: 好譏笑人的尋找智慧，卻尋不著； 聰明人尋找知識，卻輕易得著。

en: Leave the presence of a fool, for there you do not meet words of knowledge.
zh: 你當離開愚昧人， 因為你不會從他的嘴裡曉得知識。

en: The wisdom of the prudent is to discern his way, but the folly of fools is deceiving.
zh: 精明人的智慧能分辨自己的道路； 愚昧人的愚妄卻欺騙自己。

en: Fools mock at the guilt offering, but the upright enjoy acceptance.
zh: 愚妄人譏笑贖愆祭， 正直人中間卻有恩寵。

en: The heart knows its own bitterness, and no stranger shares its joy.
zh: 人的苦楚，只有自己心裡知道； 心中的喜樂，外人也不能分享。

en: The house of the wicked will be destroyed, but the tent of the upright will flourish.
zh: 惡人的家必毀壞， 正直人的帳棚卻必興盛。

en: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way to death.
zh: 有一條路，人以為是正路， 走到盡頭卻是死亡之路。

en: Even in laughter the heart may ache, and the end of joy may be grief.
zh: 人在喜笑中，心裡也會有痛苦； 歡樂的結局，會是愁苦。

en: The backslider in heart will be filled with the fruit of his ways, and a good man will be filled with the fruit of his ways.
zh: 心中背道的，必飽嘗自己行為的惡果； 善人也因自己所行的，得到善報。

en: The simple believes everything, but the prudent gives thought to his steps.
zh: 愚蒙人凡話都信； 精明的人卻步步謹慎。

en: One who is wise is cautious and turns away from evil, but a fool is reckless and careless.
zh: 智慧人敬畏耶和華 ，遠離惡事； 愚昧人卻驕傲自恃。

en: A man of quick temper acts foolishly, and a man of evil devices is hated.
zh: 輕易動怒的，行事愚妄； 心懷詭計的人，被人恨惡。

en: The simple inherit folly, but the prudent are crowned with knowledge.
zh: 愚蒙人得愚妄為產業； 精明的人以知識為冠冕。

en: The evil bow down before the good, the wicked at the gates of the righteous.
zh: 壞人必俯伏在好人面前， 惡人必俯伏在義人門口。

en: The poor is disliked even by his neighbor, but the rich has many friends.
zh: 窮人連鄰舍也厭惡他； 財主卻有很多人愛他。

en: Whoever despises his neighbor is a sinner, but blessed is he who is generous to the poor.
zh: 藐視鄰舍的，是為有罪； 恩待貧窮人的，是為有福。

en: Do they not go astray who devise evil? Those who devise good meet steadfast love and faithfulness.
zh: 圖謀惡事的，不是走錯了嗎？ 謀求善事的，必得慈愛和誠實。

en: In all toil there is profit, but mere talk tends only to poverty.
zh: 一切勞苦都有益處， 嘴上空談引致貧窮。

en: The crown of the wise is their wealth, but the folly of fools brings folly.
zh: 智慧人的冠冕是他們的財富； 愚昧人的愚妄，始終是愚妄。

en: A truthful witness saves lives, but one who breathes out lies is deceitful.
zh: 作真見證的，救人性命； 吐出謊言的，以詭詐害人。

en: In the fear of the LORD one has strong confidence, and his children will have a refuge.
zh: 敬畏耶和華的，大有倚靠； 他的子孫也有避難所。

en: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death.
zh: 敬畏耶和華是生命的泉源， 能使人避開死亡的網羅。

en: In a multitude of people is the glory of a king, but without people a prince is ruined.
zh: 君王的榮耀在於人民眾多， 帝王的沒落由於國民寡少。

en: Whoever is slow to anger has great understanding, but he who has a hasty temper exalts folly.
zh: 不輕易動怒的，十分聰明； 輕易動怒的，大顯愚妄。

en: A tranquil heart gives life to the flesh, but envy makes the bones rot.
zh: 心裡平靜，可使身體健康； 但嫉妒能使骨頭朽爛。

en: Whoever oppresses a poor man insults his Maker, but he who is generous to the needy honors him.
zh: 欺壓貧寒的，就是辱罵造他的主； 恩待窮苦人的，就是尊敬造他的主。

en: The wicked is overthrown through his evildoing, but the righteous finds refuge in his death.
zh: 惡人必因自己所行的惡事被推倒， 義人死的時候仍有所倚靠。

en: Wisdom rests in the heart of a man of understanding, but it makes itself known even in the midst of fools.
zh: 智慧居於聰明人的心中； 愚昧人心裡所存的，人所周知 在愚昧人心裡也顯明自己”）。

en: Righteousness exalts a nation, but sin is a reproach to any people.
zh: 正義使國家興盛， 罪惡是人民的羞辱。

en: A servant who deals wisely has the king's favor, but his wrath falls on one who acts shamefully.
zh: 明慧的臣僕，為王喜悅； 貽羞的僕人，遭王震怒。
